title: AI Solutions Engineer
company_focus: ML-powered document processing and data extraction
description:
About Nanonets

Nanonets has a vision to help computers see the world
starting with reading and understanding documents.Machine
Learning (ML) is no longer a futuristic concept—it's a
present-day powerhouse transforming the business landscape.
Nanonets is at the forefront of this transformation,
offering innovative ML solutions designed to make document
related processes faster than ever before.

From automating data extraction processes to enhancing
reconciliation, our solutions are designed to revolutionize
workflows, optimize operations, and unlock untapped
potential for our clients. Our client footprint spans across
brands such as Toyota, Boston Scientific, Bill.com and
Entergy to name a few enabling businesses across a myriad of
industries to unlock the potential of their visual and
textual data

We recently announced a series B round of $29 million in
funding by Accel and are backed by the likes of existing
investors including Elevation Capital & YCombinator. This
infusion of capital underscores our commitment to driving
innovation and expanding our reach in delivering cutting-
edge AI solutions to businesses worldwide.

Read about the release here: Forbes | TechCrunch

We’re on a mission to hire the very best and are committed
to creating exceptional employee experiences where everyone
is respected and has access to equal opportunity.

About the role:

We’re looking to hire a proactive AI Solutions Engineer who
brings deep product expertise and a customer-first
mindset.This role is about delighting customers through
thoughtful solutions and trusted guidance.You’ll build
strong, long-term relationships by understanding needs and
delivering real value.

What you'll do

- Collaborate with Account Executives and Sales Head with
  technical feasibility analysis.
- Prepare technical demos for Sales which can include any
  external API integration.
- Participate in sales calls to present the demos and/or
  answer technical queries.
- Find creative solutions for a variety of use-cases.
- Help improve the company's internal functioning by
  automating and streamlining processes.
- Help the software team with minor feature development & bug
  fixes.

Required Qualifications -

- B.E/B.Tech or from a Tier 1 school.
- Minimum 2 years in a technical role.

Need to Have:

- Python
- Relational Database (any major DB)
- Understanding of APIs
- Git version control
- Excellent written & verbal communication skills

Good to Have:

- Experience with React, NodeJS, Golang, Cassandra,
  Kubernetes, Docker
- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills,
  including the ability to work with technical and non-
  technical audiences; as well as communicate effectively to
  individual contributors, management, and executive
  leadership.
- Strong communications skills, with the distinctive ability
  to empower and influence people without authority or a
  direct reporting relationship.
responsibilities: Collaborate with Account Executives and Sales Head on technical feasibility analysis
Prepare technical demos for Sales including external API integrations
Participate in sales calls to present demos and answer technical queries
Find creative solutions for a variety of customer use-cases
Help improve internal functioning by automating and streamlining processes
Assist software team with minor feature development and bug fixes
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a pre-sales/solutions engineering role focused on
technical demos, API integrations, and supporting sales
processes. While the company builds AI/ML document
processing products, this role involves presenting existing
solutions and minor development work rather than building,
training, or deploying AI models.
